## Type of Change

<!-- Mark the relevant option with an "x". -->

- [ ] `feat` — new feature or configuration file
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix or correction
- [ ] `docs` — documentation update
- [ ] `chore` — maintenance, tooling, or repository setup
- [ ] `refactor` — code/content restructuring without behaviour change

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read `AGENTS.md` and followed its guidelines.
- [ ] My changes are consistent with the conventions in the file(s) I edited.
- [ ] The `README.md` directory structure table is up to date (if new files were added).
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or sensitive data are included.
